description_text: Universal 10Pcs Shark Fin Diffuser Vortex Generator Car Wing Roof Spoiler Bumper Description Features: 100% brand new and high quality. ABS plastic material, high hardness, impact resistant and heat resistant. Unique appearance and peaceful match, a good decoration for car. Can effectively reduce airflow noise and make driving quieter. Suitable for most cars, trucks, off-road vehicles, trailers, etc. Specifications: Material: ABS Color: Black How to install this product: 1. Before removing the tape protective film from the product, find the correct location you want to install. 2. Clean the surface of the installation location to ensure clean, free of grease and wax. 3. Carefully place the product in the exact position, remove the protective film, and press to ensure good adhesion. 4. Do not wash the car within 24 hours to keep it bond strength. 5. If you have a hot air blower, you can quickly heat the product's tape to increase stickiness. (affected by temperature) Package Include: 10pcs Car Roof Shark Fins Note: Please allow minor error due to manual measurement. The colors may be a little difference for the different monitor display. - Professional Auto Parts Products -
